title: zanthoxylum punctatum subsp. punctatum
intro: Zanthoxylum punctatum subsp. punctatum, also known as the Chilean pepper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum punctatum subsp. punctatum include its potential to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
